Program Listing for File rigid_body_factory.hpp
===============================================

|exhale_lsh| :ref:`Return to documentation for file <file_src_physics_assets_rigid_body_factory.hpp>` (``src/physics/assets/rigid_body_factory.hpp``)

.. |exhale_lsh| unicode:: U+021B0 .. UPWARDS ARROW WITH TIP LEFTWARDS

.. code-block:: cpp

   #pragma once
   
   #include <entt/entt.hpp>
   
   #include "../world.hpp"
   
   namespace cardillo::physics {
   
   struct RigidBodyFactory {
       static entt::entity create(World& system, const physics::RigidShape& shape, const physics::RigidState& state, const physics::RigidProps& props);
   };
   
   }  // namespace cardillo::physics
